title: QWORK® Galvanized Welded Wire Mesh, 1Mx20M Aviary Wire Mesh 12.7mm Holes, Wire Mesh Fence, for Chicken Coops, Rabbit Enclosures
features: Durable Material: Made from galvanized iron with double zinc coating, ensuring maximum rust resistance and longevity.
Size: It is 1mx20m and the size of the mesh eye is about 12.7mmx12.7mm.
Effective Defense: Designed to keep out small voles, gophers, raccoons, and snakes, safeguarding your pets and plants.
Easy Installation: Recommend digging a shallow trench for partial underground installation; the flexible material is simple to cut as needed.
Versatile Applications: Perfect for chicken coops, rabbit fencing, snake enclosures, and protecting flower or vegetable gardens from small animals.
description: Product Description About Qwork Save more, get more No ads, just low prices and good stuff. We keep it simple and make sure you get the best for less. Choose Qwork, where your money works harder for you.
